<table class="infobox">
<tr><th colspan="2" class="infobox-title">{{{name}}}</th></tr>
{{#if:{{{image|}}}|<tr><td colspan="2" class="infobox-image">{{{image|}}}{{#if:{{{caption|}}}|<div class="infobox-caption">{{{caption|}}}</div>}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{spouse|}}}{{{parents|}}}{{{siblings|}}}{{{children|}}}|<tr><td colspan="2" class="infobox-section">Family</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{spouse|}}}|<tr><th class="infobox-label">Spouse</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{spouse|}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{parents|}}}|<tr><th class="infobox-label">Parents</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{parents|}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{siblings|}}}|<tr><th class="infobox-label">Siblings</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{siblings|}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{children|}}}|<tr><th class="infobox-label">Children</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{children|}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{species|}}}|<tr><th class="infobox-label">Species</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{species|}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{abilities|}}}|<tr><th class="infobox-label">Abilities</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{abilities|}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{titles|}}}|<tr><th class="infobox-label">Titles</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{titles|}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{aliases|}}}|<tr><th class="infobox-label">Aliases</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{aliases|}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{affiliations|}}}|<tr><th class="infobox-label">Affiliations</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{affiliations|}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{professions|}}}|<tr><th class="infobox-label">Professions</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{professions|}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{birthplace|}}}|<tr><th class="infobox-label">Birthplace</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{birthplace|}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{residence|}}}|<tr><th class="infobox-label">Residence</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{residence|}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{appears_in|}}}|<tr><th class="infobox-label">Appears in</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{appears_in|}}}</td></tr>}}
<tr><th class="infobox-label">Introduced</th><td class="infobox-data">{{{introduced}}}</td></tr>
</table><noinclude>Character infobox (generated by mediawiki/gen_infobox_templates.py; styling in [[MediaWiki:Common.css]]).</noinclude>
